originalDescription: Add a security audit step to the GitHub Actions CI workflow (ci.yml or ci-matrix.yml). Run `npm audit --audit-level=high` (or pnpm audit after migration) to detect vulnerable dependencies. Fail the build on high/critical vulnerabilities. This step should run on every PR and push to main.
sanitizedDescription: Add a security audit step to the GitHub Actions CI workflow (ci.yml or ci-matrix.yml). Run `npm audit --audit-level=high` (or pnpm audit after migration) to detect vulnerable dependencies. Fail the build on high/critical vulnerabilities. This step should run on every PR and push to main.
